tasks.label: Ensemble: Stream Logs
tasks.command: xcrun simctl spawn booted log stream --predicate 'subsystem BEGINSWITH "com.videogorl.ensemble"' --level debug

tasks.label: Agent A: Preview on main worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-a && git checkout --detach && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentA}

tasks.label: Agent A: Send back to agent worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout develop && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-a && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentA}

tasks.label: Agent B: Preview on main worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-b && git checkout --detach && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentB}

tasks.label: Agent B: Send back to agent worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout develop && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-b && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentB}
